snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark
Vocal Production & Mixed By - G-Spark
Additional Mix Mastered By - Rupendar Venkatesh @mixmagic Studios

Director : Piyush - Shazia
Choreographer : Piyush – Shazia

Choreographer Assistants:
Niyati Raval, Hemant Kumar , 
Prashant Acharya 
Project Head: Sajid Samji
Executive Producer: Rahul Sehal
Line Producer: Abdul Vahid M
DOP: Ujjwal Gupta
DOP Assistants: Abhimanyu Banerji
Focus Pullers: Faisal & Vikas
Gaffer: Saddam Ali
Ronin Operators: Sunny
Art Director: Saurabh
Assistant Art Directors: Sandhiya Singh, Mazhar
Production Managers:
Sachin Gupta, Deva Jarvis, Ajay Yadav
Editor: Rishabh Shetty
Edit Studio: Stitch Media
Assistant Editor : Hrushikesh Parshuram , Darshan Takke 
DI: Onkar Singh 
CGI/VFX - @nohmi._ @xenius.17
Compositing - @nohmi._, Govind Sevak
FX artist - Rushikesh Sontakke
Cleanup - Shubham Lohar
Matchmove - Ganesh Singh 
Roto- Rohit & Mausam & Prakash
Costume Stylist: Denish Hamirani
Costume Assistants:
Muskan Gadhiya, Khushi Arora, Pallavi, Rajat Kamra, Muskan Vaildingwalla, Amber
Poster & Stills: Raj Inamdar
BTS Videos: Raj Inamdar, Sohil Khan
Sanju Hair: Azruddin Salmani
Sanju makeup & Dancer HMU: Karan Singh
Believe A&R Manager - Vishnu Iyer
Believe Marketing Manager - Neha Lakhwani 
Director’s Spot: Vicky Avhad

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu
 
#RajaShivajiTrailer #RiteishDeshmukh #SanjayDutt, #AbhishekBachchan, #VidyaBalan, #SachinKhedekar, #Bhagyashree, #FardeenKhan, #JitendraJoshi, #AmoleGupte, #BomanIrani, #JyotiDeshpande, #GeneliaDeshmukh, #AjayAtul #RemoDsouza

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Teaser) | Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
Samay sab kuch badal deta hai…
par patiyon ki fitrat uske bhi bas mein nahi 😬

Aa rahe hain Prajapati Pandey…
is baar apni Patni aur Woh Do ke saath! 😉

Presenting the Official Teaser of Pati Patni Aur Woh Do Starring Ayushmann Khurrana , Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi ,Rakul Preet Singh,Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

snippet.title: तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में | Aap To Aise Na The | Mohammed Rafi Songs | Om Shivpuri
snippet.description:
मोहम्मद रफ़ी साहब, एक ऐसी आवाज़ जो आज भी हमारे दिलों में बसी है। उनकी आवाज़ में एक दर्द है, एक प्यार है, जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। 80 के दशक के उनके रोमांटिक गाने आज भी हर प्यार करने वाले की पसंद हैं। 'तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में' एक ऐसा ही नगमा है, जो प्यार की गहराई को बयां करता है। रफ़ी साहब के गाये इस गाने में प्यार की मासूमियत, विरह की पीड़ा और मिलन की आस छुपी हुई है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर में ले जाता है जब प्यार इज़हार करने के लिए शब्दों की ज़रूरत नहीं होती थी, बस आँखों ही आँखों में सब कुछ कह दिया जाता था।


Credits :

Song: Tu Is Tarah Se Mere Zindagi Main
Album: Aap To Aise Na The
Artist: Mohammed Rafi
Music Director: Usha Khanna
Lyricist: Nida Fazli 


ऐसे ही और भी कई गाने हैं रफ़ी साहब के, जो आज भी हमें सुकून देते हैं और प्यार की याद दिलाते हैं। उनकी आवाज़ में एक जादू है, जो हमें हमेशा के लिए उनका दीवाना बना देता है। आइए, इस खूबसूरत गाने को सुनें और रफ़ी साहब की आवाज़ के जादू में खो जाएं।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया हो, तो इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

#TuIsTarahSe #AapToAiseNaThe #MohammedRafi #80sHindiSongs #RomanticSongs

snippet.title: #Teaser | छिल देबू का | Power Star Pawan Singh & Khushi Kakkar | Chil Debu Ka | New Bhojpuri Song
snippet.description:
जब पावरस्टार पवन सिंह की आवाज़, खुशी कक्कड़ का साथ और प्रिया रघुवंशी की अदाएं एक साथ हों… तो गाना सुपरहिट तो होना ही है! 🔥✨
“छिल देबू का” का टीज़र आ चुका है 💥
🎶 मेलोडी मैन प्रियांशु सिंह का संगीत
✍️ आशुतोष तिवारी व निक्की निहाल के गीत
💃 गोल्डी–सनी की कोरियोग्राफी
🎬 बिभांशु तिवारी का निर्देशन

🎬 पूरा गाना कल सुबह 06:30 AM बजे RVF Music पर रिलीज होगा 🎶
तैयार हो जाइए एक और सुपरहिट भोजपुरी धमाके के लिए 😎

👉 अगर आपको टीज़र पसंद आया तो Like 👍, Share 🔁 और Channel को Subscribe जरूर करें 🔔

► Album: छिल देबू का
► Song: Chil Debu Ka
► Singer: Power Star Pawan Singh & Khushi Kakkar
► Lyrics: Aashutosh Tiwari & Nikki Nihal 
► Music Director: Priyanshu Singh
► Video Director: Bibhanshu Tiwari
► Blessings: Parents and Ajit Singh (Jokhari) 
► Choreographers: Goldie Jaiswal and Sunny Sonkar 
► Produced By: Nishant Ujjwal
► Company/Label: RVF Music
► Digital Partner: Global Music Junction

snippet.title: Jawaak (Official Trailer) | Neeru Bajwa | New Punjabi Movie 2026 | In Cinemas 8th May 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents the official trailer of Jawaak, an upcoming Punjabi kids' movie starring the versatile Neeru Bajwa. This heartwarming children’s movie revolves around the journey of four young friends, capturing the innocence, imagination, and strong bond of childhood.

Jawaak beautifully blends fun, emotions, and meaningful life lessons, making it a perfect family movie. The film highlights themes of friendship presented through engaging storytelling and relatable characters. With vibrant visuals and a feel-good narrative, this kids' movie promises to connect with both children and adults alike.

If you enjoy children's movies that focus on friendship stories, coming-of-age adventures, and family-friendly entertainment, Jawaak is definitely one to watch. Stay tuned for an upcoming Punjabi movie that celebrates childhood in its purest form.

#jawaak #neerubajwa #punjabimovie #familymovie #kidsmovie #newpunjabimovie #movietrailer 


NEERU BAJWA ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS PUNJABI FILM JAWAAK 
TITLE - JAWAAK
CAST - NERRU BAJWA, GURI GHUMAN, PIHU, KULRAJ, JAIVIK WADHVA

Directed by - JATINDER MAUHAR
Written by - JAGDEEP WARRING
Produced by - SANTOSH SUBHASH THITE

localized.title: Jawaak (Official Trailer) | Neeru Bajwa | New Punjabi Movie 2026 | In Cinemas 8th May 2026
localized.description:
Speed Records presents the official trailer of Jawaak, an upcoming Punjabi kids' movie starring the versatile Neeru Bajwa. This heartwarming children’s movie revolves around the journey of four young friends, capturing the innocence, imagination, and strong bond of childhood.

Jawaak beautifully blends fun, emotions, and meaningful life lessons, making it a perfect family movie. The film highlights themes of friendship presented through engaging storytelling and relatable characters. With vibrant visuals and a feel-good narrative, this kids' movie promises to connect with both children and adults alike.

If you enjoy children's movies that focus on friendship stories, coming-of-age adventures, and family-friendly entertainment, Jawaak is definitely one to watch. Stay tuned for an upcoming Punjabi movie that celebrates childhood in its purest form.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Trailer REVIEW | Suraj Kumar
snippet.description:
🔥 Raja Shivaji Trailer Review & Reaction 🔥

In this video, we bring you the full review and reaction of the much-awaited Raja Shivaji Trailer. Experience the grand visuals, powerful dialogues, epic background music, and historical pride of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj showcased in this amazing trailer. We discuss trailer highlights, acting performance, cinematography, VFX, storyline expectations, and audience reaction. If you are a fan of historical action films and Shivaji Maharaj’s inspiring legacy, this video is for you!

Watch till the end for honest review, reaction, and trailer breakdown. Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more movie updates and reactions.

snippet.title: UP WALI BIHAR WALI OFFICIAL TRAILER  I यू. पी. वाली बिहार वाली  I RANI CHATTERJEE I SANJANA PANDEY
snippet.description:
#ranichatterjee #sanjanapandey #prashantsingh #aloksingh #reenarani #upwalibiharwali #trending #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म – यू . पी वाली बिहार वाली  (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – रानी  चटर्जी  संजना  पांडेय , प्रशांत  सिंह  , अलोक  सिंह  , रीना  रानी  , ललित  उपाध्याय , श्वेता वर्मा  प्रेम  दुबे
बाल कलाकार - स्वस्तिका
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो (संजय दास )
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय   
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – राम दुलारे

निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे

ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष  गर्ग  , रविंदर  साल्वी , रितेश  सिंह  , हर्षिल  शाह , शैलेश  त्रिवेदी  , प्रफुल  गैकवार्ड

FILM- UP WALI BIHAR WALI (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- RANI CHATTERJEE , SANJANA PANDEY PRASHANT SINGH , ALOK SINGH , RINA RANI , LALIT UPADHYAY , SHWETA VERMA ,PREM DUBEY , 
CHILD ARTIST – SWASTIKA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – ARBIND TIWARI   
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI 
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- RAAM DULARE 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO – (SANJAY DAS)
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN RAY
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 
B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, RITESH SINGH , HARSHIL SHAH, SHAILESH TRIVEDI , PRAFUL GAIKWARD 

Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

snippet.title: Citadel Season 2 - Official Trailer | Available In Multi - Audio | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
The world isn’t ready. Season 2 of #CitadelOnPrime arrives May 6, available in English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Kannada.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
snippet.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Trailer Launch ला Ritesh Deshmukh का रडला? ट्रेलर लाँचला अख्खं बॉलिवूड राहिलं उपस्थित
snippet.description:
Raja Shivaji या भव्य ऐतिहासिक चित्रपटाचा ट्रेलर लॉन्च सोहळा मोठ्या दिमाखात पार पडला. या खास कार्यक्रमात Riteish Deshmukh यांची उपस्थिती आणि चित्रपटाविषयीचे खास अपडेट्स पाहायला मिळाले.छत्रपती Shivaji Maharaj यांच्या जीवनावर आधारित हा सिनेमा प्रेक्षकांसाठी एक भव्य अनुभव ठरणार आहे.

#riteshdeshmukh #rajashivaji #rajashivajifilm


🔴लॉग इन करा: https://www.mumbaitak.in/
Follow us on :
Google News : https://news.google.com/publications/CAAqBwgKMLeLpAsw-pW8Aw?hl=mr&gl=IN&ceid=IN%3Amr

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mumbaitak
Twitter: https://twitter.com/mumbai_tak
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzHYo6L3SZJGBWc_BPfqMt5Yq24d_AXCa

#maharashtra #marathi #marathinews #MumbaiTakNews  #LatestMarathiNews #MaharashtraPolitics

इंडिया टुडेच्या मुंबई तक या मराठी युट्यूब चॅनलवर आपलं स्वागत. इंडिया टुडे ग्रुपचे मॅगझिन, इंडिया टुडे टीव्ही आणि आज तक हे लोकप्रिय न्यूज चॅनल आपल्याला माहितीच आहे. त्यानंतर आता खास मराठी प्रेक्षकांसाठी आपण भारतीय प्रादेशिक भाषेतलं पहिलं मराठी चॅनल घेऊन आलोय. महाराष्ट्रासह राष्ट्रीय आणि आंतरराष्ट्रीयस्तरावरील महत्वाच्या बातम्या आणि घडामोडी आपल्याला अगदी सोप्या शब्दांत समजावण्याचा आमचा प्रयत्न असणार आहे. 
Namskar, Welcome to India Today group’s new Marathi YouTube channel – Mumbai Tak. Get all the latest important stories and updates from in and around Maharashtra in Marathi. Stay Tuned to Mumbai Tak for current affairs, politics, sports, business, entertainment, literature and many more in Marathi.

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้
กำกับซีรีส์ : วาสุเทพ เกตุเพ็ชร์

รายชื่อนักแสดง
สกาย วงศ์รวี นทีธร                 รับบท  นิรันดร์
นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์ ช่างคำ          รับบท  พีท

snippet.title: RAZOR - Official Trailer | A Ravi Babu Film | Flying Frogs Production | In Cinemas May 8th, 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting Here’s the Official Trailer of RAZOR  on Suresh Productions.

Razor is an Upcoming Telugu Movie Written & Directed by Ravi Babu. Presented by Suresh Productions, Produced by Flying Frogs Production.

Releasing Cinemas In May 8th, 2026.

#RazorTrailer  #RazorMovie  #RaviBabu  #FlyingFrogsProduction #SureshProductions #telugutrailers  #tollywoodtrailers  #latesttelugumovies2026  #upcomingmovies2026 

-----------------------

Suresh Productions (Telugu: సురేష్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్) is a film production company, a subsidiary of Rama Naidu Studios, founded by Dr. D. Ramanaidu. The production house of the company is Ramanaidu Studios which is located at Hyderabad. snippet.title: KANGULA - Official Trailer l New Odia Film l Sambeet Acharya & Suryamayee Mohapatra l Aswin Tripathy
snippet.description:
#kangula #babubhaiproduction #officialtrailer 


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL TRAILER
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide on 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion turns into शक्ति…
A force awakens that cannot be contained.
Presenting the Official Trailer of KANGULA – Maa Kali Ra Danda Nacha, a soul-stirring cinematic journey inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted deep in the culture and soil of Odisha, and driven by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA unfolds a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine power that transcends generations.
This is not just a story…
This is a ritual.
This is a roar of faith.
Feel the rising intensity.
Witness the power of devotion.
Experience the divine presence of Maa Kali like never before.
🔱 The drums are louder.
🔥 The fire burns stronger.
🌺 Maa is arriving.
🎥 FILM CREDITS
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit
Background Music: Nabs & Saroj
Cinematography: Ishwar Barik
Editor: Manas Kumar Sahoo
Associate Editor: Debadatta Biswal
Colorist: P.V Manikumar
DI Studio: Cherry Pix, Kolkata
Voice Dubbing: Shakti Studio
Sound Designer: Jubin Raj
Sound Design Studio: SoundSmith Studio, Kerala
Choreographer: Firoz & Dibya
Styling: Prerna Pratikshya
Art Director: Sudhanshu Mohanty (Nilu)
Costume Partner: OAURA
Costume Man: Prabitra Mehena
Associate Director: Durllava
Assistant Directors: Joy, Shanti, Satyajeet
Production Manager: Sankar
Make Up: Sourav Lenka (Pupun)
Edit Studio: Pupul Films
Publicity Partner: IDOL ODISHA
Publicity Design: Blank Canvas RGF
Camera Equipment: Digital Dreams
Creative Visual: ATF Studio
Stills: Basudev Films
BTS Making: Sourav Nath
Visual Effects: Subrat
Promo GFX: The M Factor

Publisher - BABU BHAI PRODUCTION

All Rights Reserved 
©BABUBHAIPRODUCTION

#Kangula #OfficialTrailer #MaaKaliRaDandaNacha #InCinemas24April2026 #OdiaCinema #DandaNacha #JaiMaaKali #OdiaCulture #KangulaFilm #IndianCinema

snippet.description:
Song Credits
Singer(s): Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Vijay Mehta
Director: Aziz Sajawal
Cast: Govinda, Rani Mukherjee, Kader Khan, Johnny Lever, Zohra Sehgal

Lyrics:
Mehendi Hai Mehendi
Sharma Na Aise Banno Re
Ab Jana Hai Ghar Tuhjko Sajan Ke
Chalenge Hum BHi Tere Sang
Tere Dahej Mein Tere Ghar Sajan Ke
Tujhko Hi
Tujhko Hi
Oy Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Jake Jogan Ban Jaungi
Sang Tere Na Mein Aaungi
Sab Se Me Yeh Keh Jaungi
Tujhko Na Dulhan Banaungi X2
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi X2
Tere Liye Launga Bindiya Chand Sitaron Ki
Ha Tere Liye Launga Bindiya Chand Sitaron Ki
Pehnaunga Chunar Main Tujhko Nayi Baharon Ki
Arey Jaa Re Kunware
Mujhpe Dore Dal Na Tu Aise
Mere Aage Pichhe Firte Hai Tere Jaise
Nakhre Na Kar Deewani
Abb Man Bhi Jaa Rani
Naa Banegi Teree Kahani
Chal Chhod Dey Yeh Manmani
Tujhko Hi Challa Pehnaunga
Ha Tujhko Hi Challa Pehnaunga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Jake Jogan Ban Jaungi
Sang Tere Na Main Aaungi
Sab Se Me Yeh Keh Jaungi
Tujhko Naa Dula Banaungi
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Shadi Wadi Ke Chakkar Mein
Mujhe Nhi Padna
Arey Shadi Wadi Ke Chakkar Mein
Mujhe Nhi Padna
Char Deewaro Mein Gut Gut Ke
Mujhe Nahii Marna
Khuli Hawaon Ki Mein
Tujhko Ser Karaunga
Honey Moon Mein London Paris Tujhe Gumanunga
Chikni Chikni Bato Mein Aaon Naa Tere Hatho Mein
Mujhko Jo Takraye Gi Too Bad Mein Pachtayegi
Na Sej Teri Sajaungi
Ha Na Sej Teri Sajaungi
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi
Bin Tere Na Jee Paonga
Bine Tere Na Mar Paonga
Sab Se Mein Yeh Keh Jaaoonga
Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Yeh Jid Chhod Dey Nata Jod De
Rab Kaa Naam Le
Daman Tham Le
Maan Bhi Le Tu Mera Kehna Saath Tere Nahi Mujhko Rehna
Kab Doli Baarat Mein Lau Kaise Tujhko Mein Samjau
Kya Tune Yeh Soch Liya Hai
Haan Maine Yeh Soch Liya Hai
Yaro Zeher Ki Pudiya Lao
Yeh Pagal Hai Isse Bachao
Tere Bina Mujhko Nahi Jina
Karna Aisi Khata Kabhi Na
Mujhko Ab Yeh Zeher Hai Pina
Zakh Mein Dil Muhjko Nahi Sina
Chhod Ke Duniya Chala Main Chala X3
Lagata Iski Jan Gayi Re X3
Ise Kaho Main Maan Gayi Re X3
Ooooo Lo Mein Maan Gayi
Ha Mein Maan Gayi
Tere Pyar Ko Main Pehchan Gayi
Tujhko Hi Dulha Banaungi
Tujhse Hi Shadi Rachaungi
Warna Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Warna Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main

Hey everyone! I'm Akshay Teotia
Welcome to the Ball-by-Ball Score Commentary for the SRH vs DC 31th T20 IPL 2026 Dc Batting.Join Sports Khabar for fast score updates and engaging commentary!

20 runs coming off the final over to cap off a dominant finish. It was a complete Abhishek Sharma show tonight here in Hyderabad. Axar Patel had a tough outing as captain, with things not quite going his way on the field. SRH piled on the runs in the second half, smashing 138 runs to finish at a massive total of 242/2 in their 20 overs.

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

Teri Ore Lyrics:

Dil kho gaya ho gaya kisi ka,
abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi
ka, abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Rishta naya rabba, dil chhu raha hai
Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

khulti fizayen khulti ghataye
sar pe naya hai aasmaan
Chaaro dishaaye haske bulaaye,
kyon sab huye hai meherbaan
Ha humane to yahi rabba
kasam se pata hai
Dil pe nahi koyi jor koyi jor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

Ek heer thi aur tha ek ranjha,
kehate hai mere gaanv mein
Saccha ho dil to sau muskilon
ho, jhukata naseeba pau main
Ho ho aanchal tera rabba
falak ban gaya hai
Aab iska nahi koyi oor koyi chhor

Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

de-DE.title: Teri Ore (Liedtext-Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Liebeslied
de-DE.description:
Spüre die Magie der Liebe mit „Teri Ore“, einem Liebeslied aus „Singh Is Kinng“ 💖✨

Mit dem unvergesslichen Bollywood-Traumpaar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif, bekannt für ihre unglaubliche Leinwandchemie, fängt dieser romantische Song die Essenz der Liebe wunderschön ein. Gesungen von Rahat Fateh Ali Khan und Shreya Ghoshal, mit Musik von Pritam, zählt „Teri Ore“ zu den beliebtesten Bollywood-Liebesliedern.

Dieses zeitlose Hindi-Liebeslied ist bekannt für seine sanfte Melodie, die gefühlvollen Texte und die unvergesslichen Bilder. Ob verliebt oder einfach nur ein Fan klassischer Bollywood-Musik – „Teri Ore“ schafft eine tiefe emotionale Verbindung, die lange anhält. 💫

Das legendäre Paar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif strahlt im gesamten Song. Um mehr von ihrer magischen Chemie zu erleben, solltest du dir auch die Songs aus „Welcome“ sowie weitere Hits aus „Singh Is Kinng“ wie „Jee Karda“, „Talli Hua“ und „Bhootni Ke“ anhören. 🎶

💬 Verratet uns in den Kommentaren: Ist das euer liebster romantischer Bollywood-Song?

pt-BR.title: Teri Ore (vídeo lírico) | Singh é rei | Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Canção de amor
pt-BR.description:
Sinta a magia do amor com Teri Ore, uma canção romântica de Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Estrelada pela dupla icônica de Bollywood, Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif, conhecidos por sua incrível química em cena, esta canção romântica captura lindamente a essência do amor. Cantada por Rahat Fateh Ali Khan e Shreya Ghoshal, com música de Pritam, Teri Ore continua sendo uma das canções de amor mais amadas de Bollywood.

Esta canção romântica hindi atemporal é conhecida por sua melodia suave, letra emocionante e visuais inesquecíveis. Seja você apaixonado ou simplesmente um apreciador da música clássica de Bollywood, Teri Ore cria uma conexão emocional profunda que permanece com você. 💫

A dupla icônica de Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif brilha ao longo da música. Para apreciar ainda mais a química mágica deles, não perca as músicas de Welcome, além de outros sucessos de Singh Is Kinng, como Jee Karda, Talli Hua e Bhootni Ke. 🎶

Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. 💫

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. 🎶

hi.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
hi.description:
'सिंह इज़ किंग' के प्रेम गीत 'तेरी ओर' के साथ प्यार के जादू को महसूस करें 💖✨

अत्यंत लोकप्रिय बॉलीवुड जोड़ी अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की इस रोमांटिक फिल्म में, जो अपनी बेमिसाल केमिस्ट्री के लिए जाने जाते हैं, प्यार का सार खूबसूरती से बयां किया गया है। राहत फतेह अली खान और श्रेया घोषाल द्वारा गाए गए और प्रीतम द्वारा संगीतबद्ध किए गए 'तेरी ओर' आज भी बॉलीवुड के सबसे प्रिय प्रेम गीतों में से एक है।

यह सदाबहार हिंदी रोमांटिक गीत अपनी मधुर धुन, दिल को छू लेने वाले बोल और अविस्मरणीय दृश्यों के लिए जाना जाता है। चाहे आप प्यार में हों या सिर्फ क्लासिकल बॉलीवुड संगीत के शौकीन हों, 'तेरी ओर' एक गहरा भावनात्मक जुड़ाव पैदा करता है जो हमेशा आपके साथ रहता है। 💫

अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की यह प्रतिष्ठित जोड़ी पूरे गाने में चमकती है। उनकी जादुई केमिस्ट्री का और आनंद लेने के लिए, 'वेलकम' के गानों के साथ-साथ 'सिंह इज़ किंग' के अन्य हिट गाने जैसे 'जी करदा', 'तल्ली हुआ' और 'भूतनी के' देखना न भूलें। 🎶

💬 हमें कमेंट्स में बताएं — क्या यह आपका पसंदीदा रोमांटिक बॉलीवुड गाना है?

Adhuri Si Mohabbat, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

snippet.title: Aitbaar | Chand Mera Dil | Lakshya, Ananya Panday | Sachin-Jigar, Faheem Abdullah, Amitabh B.
snippet.description:
There’s heartbreak, and then there’s giving up on love 💔
 
Presenting the second song from ‘Chand Mera Dil’, ‘Aitbaar’ features Lakshya and Ananya Panday as Aarav and Chandni in the video. Composed by Sachin-Jigar, penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya and sung by Faheem Abdullah; this song is as soulful as it is relatable.
 
#Aitbaar #ChandMeraDil #Lakshya #AnanyaPanday #FaheemAbdullah #SachinJigar #AmitabhBhattacharya
 
Music: Sachin-Jigar
Singer: Faheem Abdullah
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Programmed & Arranged: Sachin-Jigar
Additional Programming: Hrishikesh Gangan
Chorus: Sumonto Mukherjee, Prince, Ram - B
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Music Production Head: Romil Ved
Recording Engineer: Susmeet Rewaskar @ White Noise Collectives
Mixed & Mastered: Eric Pillai @ FSOB
Assistant Mix Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai @ FSOB
Music Supervisor: Azeem Dayani
Sr. Associate Music Supervisor: Tanvi Asher
 
Dharma Productions presents
A Dharma Productions Film
Starring Ananya Panday & Lakshya
Directed by Vivek Soni
Produced by Karan Johar, Adar Poonawalla, Apoorva Mehta, Somen Mishra & Marijke deSouza
Story by Vivek Soni
Screenplay by Tushar Paranjape & Vivek Soni
Dialogues by Akshat Ghildial, Tushar Paranjape & Vivek Soni
In cinemas 22nd May, worldwide.

Lyrics:

Aisa hargiz nahin
Mujhe tumse pyaar nahin 

Aisa hargiz nahin
Mujhe tumse pyaar nahin 

Kya karoon pyaar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

Kya karoon pyar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

Dil ki halat hui hai ye pehli
bar nahin

Dil ki halat hui hai ye pehli
bar nahin

Kya karoon pyaar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

Kya karoon pyaar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

POST HOOK
Jide naal saaiyaan,
Assaan jind laaiyaan,
Dil gaya cheer oh maaiyaan ve

Ajj ton ishq da naam badal kar,
Rakh de yaar tabaahiyaan ve 

Jide naal saaiyaan,
Assaan jind laaiyaan,
Dil gaya cheer oh maaiyaan ve

Ajj ton ishq da naam badal kar,
Rakh de yaar tabaahiyaan ve 

Antra 

Hum bhi sahi thhe
Tum bhi sahi thhe
Galat phir mod kyon liya kahani ne

Is pyaar ke jo 
haq mein nahi thhe
Vahi kyon faisle liye jawaani ne 

Itne shikve magar koi zimmedar nahin
In Itne shikve magar koi zimmedar nahin

Kya karoon pyar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

Kya karoon pyar pe hi mujhko
Aitbaar nahin

POST HOOK

Jide naal saaiyaan,
Assaan jind laaiyaan,
Dil gaya cheer oh maaiyaan ve

Ajj ton ishq da naam badal kar,
Rakh de yaar tabaahiyaan ve 

Jide naal saaiyaan,
Assaan jind laaiyaan,
Dil gaya cheer oh maaiyaan ve

Ajj ton ishq da naam badal kar,
Rakh de yaar tabaahiyaan ve

snippet.title: गेहु चना की लामणी हो कदे कर कै भी ना देखी || Gurpreet Kaur Ke Geet
snippet.description:
https://youtube.com/@Gurpreetkaurofficial786?si=Ye-5HnYrsOCOPbrz

https://youtube.com/@Gurpreetkaurkegeet?si=oGJ54ER85s7LdSDX

https://youtube.com/@GurpreetKaur786.?si=vhJgUhJCou3H0aaV

#gurpreetkaurkegeet
#singer.        =  Tnu kathurwal
#writer          = lokgeet 
#music         =  Anil Rohera 
#editing        =  Aman Arya
#camraman = Aman arya
#sporting     = Deepak redhu & Rinku redhu 
#artist          =   Gurpreet kaur    

आदरणीय श्रोताओ 

सभी को गुरप्रीत कौर की तरफ से राम राम 
मेरे द्वारा किये गए हरियाणवी फोक गीतों को 
आपने इतना प्यार दिया और एक अलग ही पहचान 
दिलाई। उसके लिए आप लोगो का दिल से धन्यवाद 
और अब मैंने (gurpreet kaur vlog) के नाम से अपना यूट्यूब चैनल बनाया 
है। इसमें भी आप मेरे नए नए व्लॉग देख पाओगे।                                                                                    🥰 मेरी माँ और मेरी फॅमिली की स्पोट से ये सब कुछ हो पाया है.                                        ❤️ जिसने मुझे हर वक़्त पर संभाला छाया की तरह जो मेरे साथ रहा वो जिन्दा दिल इंसान मेरे पति देव दीपक रेढू जी को दिल से धन्यवाद् और सैलूट उनके बिना मै कुछ नहीं 🙏
कृपया मेरे चैनल को स्पॉट करे
  gurpeetkaur400@gmail.com

en-IN.title: गेहु चना की लामणी हो कदे कर कै भी ना देखी || Gurpreet Kaur Ke Geet
en-IN.description:
https://youtube.com/@Gurpreetkaurofficial786?si=Ye-5HnYrsOCOPbrz

https://youtube.com/@Gurpreetkaurkegeet?si=oGJ54ER85s7LdSDX

https://youtube.com/@GurpreetKaur786.?si=vhJgUhJCou3H0aaV

#gurpreetkaurkegeet
#singer.        =  Tnu kathurwal
#writer          = lokgeet 
#music         =  Anil Rohera 
#editing        =  Aman Arya
#camraman = Aman arya
#sporting     = Deepak redhu & Rinku redhu 
#artist          =   Gurpreet kaur    

आदरणीय श्रोताओ 

सभी को गुरप्रीत कौर की तरफ से राम राम 
मेरे द्वारा किये गए हरियाणवी फोक गीतों को 
आपने इतना प्यार दिया और एक अलग ही पहचान 
दिलाई। उसके लिए आप लोगो का दिल से धन्यवाद 
और अब मैंने (gurpreet kaur vlog) के नाम से अपना यूट्यूब चैनल बनाया 
है। इसमें भी आप मेरे नए नए व्लॉग देख पाओगे।                                                                                    🥰 मेरी माँ और मेरी फॅमिली की स्पोट से ये सब कुछ हो पाया है.                                        ❤️ जिसने मुझे हर वक़्त पर संभाला छाया की तरह जो मेरे साथ रहा वो जिन्दा दिल इंसान मेरे पति देव दीपक रेढू जी को दिल से धन्यवाद् और सैलूट उनके बिना मै कुछ नहीं 🙏
कृपया मेरे चैनल को स्पॉट करे
  gurpeetkaur400@gmail.com

#gurpreetkaur #minakshipanchal #krishanmadha #rinkuredhu #deepakredhu #haryanvi

snippet.title: Kanimaa 8K Video | RETRO | Suriya | Pooja Hegde | Karthik Subbaraj | Santhosh Narayanan | Vivek
snippet.description:
Watch the stunning “Kanimaa” 8K Video Song from RETRO, featuring Suriya and Pooja Hegde.

Composed by Santhosh Narayanan and directed by Karthik Subbaraj, this track blends soulful music, captivating visuals, and meaningful lyrics by Vivek, creating a mesmerizing cinematic experience.

🎬 Movie: RETRO
⭐ Starring: Suriya, Pooja Hegde
🎶 Music: Santhosh Narayanan
✍️ Lyrics: Vivek
🎬 Director: Karthik Subbaraj

Enjoy this beautiful 8K visual treat filled with melody and emotion.

#Kanimaa #Retro #Suriya #PoojaHegde #SanthoshNarayanan #KarthikSubbaraj #Vivek #TamilSongs #8KVideo #RomanticSongs 
---------------------------------
Connect with T-Series Tamil: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTamil
---------------------------------
🎶 Music Credits 🎶
Song: Kanima
Lyrics : Vivek
Singer : Santhosh Narayanan, The Indian Choral Ensemble
Composed / Arranged / Programmed By Santhosh Narayanan
Bass: Naveen Napier
Live percussion / Rhythm programmed by   Karthikvamsi
Thavil, kanjeera - Kaviraj   
Drum Tech - Mariyappan
Tapes: Buddhar Kalai Kuzhu
Trumpets: Vijay,Maxi,Ben
Chorus: The Indian Choral Ensemble (Chamber), Aparna Harikumar, Nidhi Saraogi, Sushmita Narasimhan, Sreekanth Hariharan, Shridhar Ramesh, Karthik Manickavasakam
Chorus arranged and Recorded by Karthik Manickavasakam
Recorded at Future Tense Studios Chennai, UNO Records
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Rupendar Venkatesh
Mixed by Santhosh Narayanan at  Future Tense Studios Chennai
Additional Mix by Rupendar Venkatesh
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh
Music Management - Meenakshi Santhosh
Studio Assistant : Jabaraj
Electric Guitar: Aditya Ravindran
Recorded by Thanushree N
Assisted by Iker Subu
At Studio Uno Records, Chennai

🎬Movie Credits 🎬
Directed by Karthik Subbaraj
Produced by Jyotika - Suriya
Cast: Suriya, Pooja Hegde, Joju George, Jayaram, Karunakaran

snippet.title: Franklin’s Family Stuck in Forest! 😱 Treehouse Survival with Shinchan | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin and his family were traveling through the forest to reach Michael’s house… but suddenly heavy rain changes everything! 😱🌧️

After taking shelter inside a container, Franklin finds that the vehicle is not working and there is no phone signal! 📵

Now Franklin, Shiranui, Shinchan, and the kids are stuck in the forest at night 🌲😨

To protect his family, Franklin decides to build a treehouse in the forest for safety 🪵🏡

But while searching for wood, they discover and rescue a trapped woodcutter named Pushpa!

As night falls, danger increases… 👀
Franklin must use the treehouse and his skills to keep his family safe.

Will they survive the night?

localized.title: Franklin’s Family Stuck in Forest! 😱 Treehouse Survival with Shinchan | GTA 5 Malayalam
localized.description:
Franklin and his family were traveling through the forest to reach Michael’s house… but suddenly heavy rain changes everything! 😱🌧️

After taking shelter inside a container, Franklin finds that the vehicle is not working and there is no phone signal! 📵

Now Franklin, Shiranui, Shinchan, and the kids are stuck in the forest at night 🌲😨

To protect his family, Franklin decides to build a treehouse in the forest for safety 🪵🏡

But while searching for wood, they discover and rescue a trapped woodcutter named Pushpa!

As night falls, danger increases… 👀
Franklin must use the treehouse and his skills to keep his family safe.

Will they survive the night?

Watch till the end for an emotional and thrilling GTA 5 Malayalam family survival adventure!

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chhota  Farmani Naaz  Nagin Si Lugai  New haryanvi Song   The Prince Yadav
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Step back into the golden era of 90s Bollywood with the enchanting melodies of Alka Yagnik and Kumar Sanu! This video celebrates their unforgettable duet, "Gawah Hai Chand Tare" from the movie Damini, a timeless love song that continues to resonate with hearts across generations. Alka Yagnik's sweet voice and Kumar Sanu's soulful rendition perfectly capture the essence of innocent love and longing. Relive the magic of this classic tune and let the nostalgia wash over you.

Song: Gawah Hai Chand Tare
Album: Damini
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Kumar Sanu

Lyricist: Sameer

ବୈଶାଖ ମାସ ଶୁକ୍ଳ ପକ୍ଷ ତୃତୀୟା ତିଥିରେ ପାଳିତ ହୁଏ ପବିତ୍ର ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା। ଏହି ଦିନଟି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କୃଷି ଓ ସଂସ୍କୃତି ପାଇଁ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ। ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ମାନସୀ ପାତ୍ରଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟାର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ ଓ ଏହାର ମହିମା

#AkshayaTrutiya #AkshayaTrutiyaMahima #ManasiPatra #OdiaCulture #SidharthUtsav #JayJagannathTV #OdiaBrataKatha #AkshayaTrutiya2026 #NamitaAgrawal #SitaramAgrawal #OdishaTradition
=============================
Song : Akshaya Trutiya Kahani
Singer : Manasi Patra
Lyrics : Arun Mantri
Music Director : Jaydev Mishra
Video Artist : Manasi Patra

snippet.description:

❀ Song Credits:
» Song: Babal De Des
» Singer: Rajvir Jawanda
» Lyrics: Kattu Wala Bhullar
» Music/Composer: G Guri
» Mix & Master: Beat King

» Featuring: Kudrat & Amaanat Kaur Jawanda
» Starring: Jarnail Singh, Amar Noorie, Gurfateh Singh, Aabshaar Kaur & Bismunpreet Kaur

» Camera Assistant: Gurjot
» Lights: Dilpreet, Hhushnaseeb, Tarn Gill & Bikram Aulakh
» Production Managed by: Balnoor

snippet.description:
सदाबहार पुराने फिल्मी गाने | Hindi Filmi Gaane | All Time Hit Songs | हिंदी फ़िल्मी नगमें | Old Songs

JUK0012

चल सन्यासी मंदिर में
फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना
शीशी भरी गुलाब की
बिंदिया चमकेगी
कोई शहरी बाबू
मैं जट यमला पगला दीवाना
चना जोर गरम
पूछे जो कोई मुझसे
आने से उसके आए बहार
अठरा बरस की तू होने को आई
मुझे इश्क है तुझी से
तुमने किसी की जान को
तारीफ करूं क्या उसकी
कितनी जवां है जिंदगी
ये तेरी सादगी
दिल खुश है आज
दिल बेकरार सा है
हमीं से मोहब्बत, हमीं से लड़ाई

JUK0012

चल सन्यासी मंदिर में
फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना
शीशी भरी गुलाब की
बिंदिया चमकेगी
कोई शहरी बाबू
मैं जट यमला पगला दीवाना
चना जोर गरम
पूछे जो कोई मुझसे
आने से उसके आए बहार
अठरा बरस की तू होने को आई
मुझे इश्क है तुझी से
तुमने किसी की जान को
तारीफ करूं क्या उसकी
कितनी जवां है जिंदगी
ये तेरी सादगी
दिल खुश है आज
दिल बेकरार सा है
हमीं से मोहब्बत, हमीं से लड़ाई

snippet.title: हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan
snippet.description:
मंगलवार स्पेशल।हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
हे दुःख भन्जन मारुती नंदन
वीर हनुमाना अति बलवाना
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
श्री हनुमान अमृतवाणी
जय हनुमंत संत हितकारी
ये चमक ये दमक सब कुछ 
ॐ हं हनुमत्ये नमो नमः
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
दुनिया चले न श्री राम के बिना
आरती कीजै हनुमान लला की

⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.title: Super bear adventure gameplay in tamil on vtg!
snippet.description:
Explore vast worlds in this sandbox-like 3D adventure

Travel through the kingdom and its different regions in this 3D adventure inspired by late 90s games. Explore each region freely, uncover their secrets, and save your bear friends! This realm was once a peaceful place, until the bees started producing purple honey, a strange substance that turns anyone who eats it into a mindless foe. You will play as Baaren, a courageous bear set on a quest to free the kingdom from this menace of unknown origin.

#superbearadventure #gaming #vasanthtamilgaming #vtg #superbear

snippet.description:
White Hill Music Presents 🔥 MIRZAPUR – Teaser Out Now! 🔥

The official teaser of the upcoming R Nait New Song 2026 “MIRZA PUR” with Gurlez Akhtar 💥
If you’re a fan of R Nait Song, R Nait All Song, or searching for the latest R Nait New Song, this track is going to hit different!

Known for delivering back-to-back bangers like a true R Nait Don, R Nait returns with another powerful track filled with attitude, desi swag, and hard lyrics 🔥
Whether you follow R Nait Songs regularly or just love Punjabi music vibes, this one deserves a spot in your playlist.

📅 Full Song Releasing on 22nd April

snippet.title: Top 30 | तन्हाई में सुने जाने वाले | पुराने दर्द भरे गाने |Old Hindi Gaane | Evergreen Hindi Jukebox
snippet.description:
Top 30 | तन्हाई में सुने जाने वाले | पुराने दर्द भरे गाने |Old Hindi Gaane | Evergreen Hindi Jukebox

JUK0132

तेरी दुनिया से दूर 
दिल तोड़ने वाले तुझे दिल ढूंढ रहा है 
वो भूली दास्ताँ लो फिर याद आ गई 
मुझे मेरे हाल पे छोड़ दो 
आएगा आने वाला 
आज कल मे डी ढल गया
मेरे महबूब कयामत होगी 
जाने वालो ज़रा मुड़के देखो मुझे
कोई लोटा दे मेरे बीते हुए दिन
पिया कैसे मिलूं तुमसे 
तुम ही मेरे मंदिर तुम ही मेरी पुजा 
तेरा जाना दिल के अरमानों का 
लेजा मेरी दुआए लेजा 
ऐ मोहब्बत तेरी दुनियाँ 
अब रात गुजरने वाली हैं 
तेरे सुर और मेरे गीत 
किसी ने अपना बना के मुझको 
हैं इसी में प्यार की आबरु 
रुक जा रात ठेर जा रे चँदा 
मेरे दिल कभी तो कोई आएगा 
हे दुनियाँ उसी की जमाना उसी का 
मैं ये सोच कर उसके दर से उठा था 
गीत गया पत्थरो ने 
महफ़िल से उठ जाने वालो 
मेरे मुकद्दर में रोना लिखा था 
तुम क्या जानो तुम्हारी याद मे 
बहुत दिया देने वाले ने तुझको 
खो दिया मेने पा कर किसी को 
सोचा था क्या क्या हो गया 
इस जग मे कहीं भी रहोगे

snippet.title: बिछुआ बोले जे खाए हिचकोले 💃🦂💥 | जबरदस्त डांस सॉन्ग | 90s हिट | अलका याग्निक हिट
snippet.description:
फिल्म Jallad का धमाकेदार और बेहद पॉपुलर गाना “बिछुआ बोले जे खाए हिचकोले” आज भी अपने देसी अंदाज़ और जबरदस्त डांस बीट्स के लिए खूब पसंद किया जाता है। 💃

इस गाने को अपनी सुरीली आवाज़ दी है Alka Yagnik ने, जिन्होंने 90 के दशक में कई सुपरहिट गाने दिए। 🎤

इस गाने में Madhoo का शानदार डांस और एक्सप्रेशंस इसे और भी खास बनाते हैं, जो आज भी दर्शकों को झूमने पर मजबूर कर देते हैं। 🎶

अगर आपको 90 के दशक के मस्ती भरे और डांस से भरपूर बॉलीवुड गाने पसंद हैं, तो यह गाना आपके लिए एक परफेक्ट एंटरटेनमेंट है! 🔥

✨ Song Details:
🎬 Movie: Jallad (1995)
🎵 Song: Bichhua Bole Je Khaye Hichkole
🎤 Singer: Alka Yagnik
🎭 Cast: Madhoo

❤️ अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 वीडियो को Like करें
💬 Comment में अपनी यादें ज़रूर शेयर करें
🔔 चैनल को Subscribe करना ना भूलें

#BichhuaBole #90sSongs #DanceSongs #OldIsGold #HindiSongs #BollywoodSongs #RetroHits #Jallad

snippet.title: Even the Trees Hate Me in This Game !😭
snippet.description:
Even the Trees Hate Me in This Game !😭
Trees Hate you Malayalam Gameplay 

➤For Business And Paid Promotions :
pfdesuza@gmail.com

About The Game
Trees Hate You is a chaotic and frustrating rage game where what should have been a simple walk home after a picnic turns into a nightmare. In this Malayalam gameplay, the forest itself feels alive—and it absolutely hates you. Every step is filled with unexpected traps, unfair tricks, and hilarious gags designed to catch you off guard and ruin your progress.
Unlike traditional platformers, this game focuses more on surprise traps, trolling mechanics, and unpredictable moments rather than precise movement. The trees are merciless, the paths are deceptive, and the game constantly plays with your expectations to create both rage and laughter.
If you enjoy rage games, funny frustrating gameplay, and unpredictable challenges, this Malayalam gameplay of Trees Hate You is perfect for you.

00:00 - Intro
00:32 - Gameplay
16:51 - End

snippet.title: कर ना सके हम प्यार का सौदा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Amrita Singh
snippet.description:
🎶 Step back into the nostalgic era of 1992 with the timeless voices of Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu. This video features the heart-wrenching song 'Kar Na Sake Hum Pyar Ka Sauda' from the movie Kal Ki Awaz, a testament to their unparalleled artistry and the golden age of Bollywood music. Relive the emotions, the melodies, and the sheer brilliance of these legendary singers as they weave a tale of love, loss, and longing.



Credits :

Song: Kar Na Sake Hum Pyar Ka Sauda
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi
jiti bazi har gaye hum
ho jiti bazi har gaye hum, kismat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi
jiti bazi har gaye hum
jiti bazi har gaye hum, kismat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi

koi na samjhe koi na jane, kaisi ye majburi hai
pas hai ek duje ke kitne, phir bhi kitni duri hai
aankho me aansu ke hai katre, hotho pe khamosi hai
hans na sake hum ro na sake hum, halat hi kuch aisi thi
hans na sake hum ro na sake hum, halat hi kuch aisi thi
jiti bazi har gaye hum
jiti bazi har gaye hum, kismat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi

ek taraf hai pyar ka daman, ek taraf hai farz mera
soch raha hu kaise chukau, ae zindagani karz tera
dekho zara kis mod pe laye, ye zalim halat hume
humko mili na tumko mili wo, chahat hi kuch aisi thi
humko mili na tumko mili wo, chahat hi kuch aisi thi
jiti bazi har gaye hum
jiti bazi har gaye hum, kismat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi
jiti bazi har gaye hum
jiti bazi har gaye hum, kismat hi kuch aisi thi
kar na sake hum pyar ka sauda, kimat hi kuch aisi thi
kimat hi kuch aisi thi
